titleStmt.title: SII 9.378: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 378. (A.R. No. 243 of 1918.) ON A PILLAR IN THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT KUNCHURU, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 10th year of the Yādava king Rāmachandradēva, cyclic year Pramāthi, Āshāḍha, ba. 10, Sōmavāra. In Pramāthi = A.D. 1279, Āshāḍh ba. 10 fell on July 5 Wednesday, not Monday; Sōmavara is probably a mistake for Saumyavāra. The inscription records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, Navakhaṇḍeya-chakravarti Kheyidēva-Rāṇeya, also called Kandhāradēva, together with Jagaddaḷa Nāchidēvarasa, who was the Manneya of Haluvāgilu, Malliya, the Ūroḍeya of the village Koṁchūru and other Mānyakāras and people made a grant of a srotra land for the service of the god Svayambhu-Kalinātha. It states that the violator of the charity would be excommunicated from the eighteen samayas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujaba
ḷaprauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdra
rāyavijeyarājyōdayada 10 pramāthisaṁva
(ṁ)tsarada Āśāḍha bahuḷa 10 sōmavāradalu . svasti
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ navakhaṁḍeyacakravartti kaḷa
tū(ṁ)ryyapaṭṭasaṁbhavaṁ śrīkaṁdhāradēva kheyidē
varāṇeyarā . svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ Ā
tiviśamahayārūḍhaprauḍharekhārēvaṁtaru
ṁ parabaḷakritāṁtanuṁ Ēkāṁgavīranuṁ raṇa
raṁgadhīranu satyaratnākaranuṁ śrīkīrttinārāyaṇa
dēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa ma(ṁ)
nneyagoḍati jagaddaḷa haluvāgila ma(ṁ)
nneya nācidēvarsaru koṁcūra vūroḍeya
rumalliya samasta praje mā(ṁ)nyakāṟaru mūkhyavā
gi mūlasthānada svayaṁbhukalināthadēvaru yi
varu srotravaṁ dhārāpūrvvakavāgi biṭṭu
sarvvanamassivāyavāgi dhāreyaneṟedu
koṭṭa �yo dharmakke matteyāvanānuṁ vobbanaḷi
hidaḍe vāraṇāsiya taḍiyalu kavile
yanuṁ brāhmaṇananuṁ vadhiyisida phala yidanu �vo
ṟiyaḷividaḍe paṁcamahāpātakavanu māḍidavara gati
ge hōgi narakake bīḷuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
raica vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī . mate �yo staḷadali yāvananu A
lleṁdaḍe hadineṁṭṭu samayakke hoṟagū dēsakke
huḷi . śrīmahādēva sarāṇū .
Digital edition of SII 9.378 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
